children.heading: Scholarships
children.label: a Scholarships
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out $800,000 for fiscal year 2001 and such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 2002 through 2007.section 15113 of this title

children.heading: Staff development curriculum
children.label: b Staff development curriculum
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out $800,000 for fiscal year 2001 and such sums as may be necessary for each of fiscal years 2002 and 2003.section 15114 of this title
